BUILD_NADIF.description: :: build support for IPC protocol component

BUILD_AT_PASSTHRU.description: :: build support for NAD AT command passthru debug command

BUILD_I2C.description: :: build support for I2C serial bus driver

BUILD_M41T81.description: :: build support for the external Real Time Clock chip, specifically part number M41T81

BUILD_PCA85063A.description: :: build support for the external Real Time Clock chip, specifically part number PCA85063A

BUILD_DC.description: :: build support for the debug console trace output (not available in bootloader)

BUILD_IPC_VUC.description: :: build support for IPC protocol component

BUILD_IPC_NAD.description: :: build support for IPC protocol component

BUILD_IPC_ETP_PLUS.description: :: Modifier for ETP_PLUS IPC. This is a signal only, i.e., it does not select content.

BUILD_BOOT.description: :: build support for example bootloader (only enable in bootloader config)

BUILD_UNIT_TEST.description: :: build support for special function access to facilitate unit testing

BUILD_IPC_UNIT_TEST.description: :: build support for unit test of IPC component

BUILD_LOCATION_SERVICES.description: :: build support for location services component

BUILD_HIGH.description: :: build support for Telematics High hardware

BUILD_DC.description: :: build support for the debug console trace output (not available in bootloader)

BUILD_BOOT.description: :: build support for example bootloader (only enable in bootloader config)

BUILD_GNSS.description: :: build option to include or not the GNSS in the FBL

BUILD_HIGH.description: :: build support for Telematics High hardware
